title: Iceburg Reveals the Blueprints
description: Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Iceburg, Blueno, Nico Robin, Nico Nico Robin, Franky. Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
